stem:
When construction of a single-family house begins, it is called a housing start. In the first four months of 2022, the highest number of housing starts in the United States was in _____

Which choice most effectively uses data from the table to complete the statement?
explanation: The table shows April with 1,803 thousand housing starts, the largest of the four months listed. March (1,713), January (1,669), and February (1,771) all fall below April’s total.
